name: Tin Hearts: Prologue
short_description: Behind every brilliant invention, hides a magical story. Tin Hearts: Prologue is the first Act of the full new Tin Hearts game, set to release this winter.
detailed_description:
WHY CAN I NO LONGER BUY TIN HEARTS?

As you may have noticed, we recently removed Tin Hearts from sale on Steam, for now.



Why did we do this?

*Drum roll* We are now working with a fantastic publisher who is helping us to bring Tin Hearts to life! With their support, we’re now able to realise the full vision of the game and deliver to the very high standards that we demand, and you want to see. To that end, we are busy making the game even better, with additional polish, enhanced gameplay, improved performance, and more… This is a very exciting development, and we will have more news to share with you all soon, including an update regarding when we intend the game to be completed.

And don’t worry, if you've already purchased the Prologue version in Early Access, you'll automatically get the new version for free at launch!

As part of this process, we have launched a new Steam page for the game, which you can access via the link below. We’ve set this page up to make a clear distinction between the early access ‘Prologue’ page (Act 1) and what will be the full and final game published by Wired Productions, this will help keep things clear and more organised.



So, it's been awesome to connect with so many of you who supported us during the Early Access phase and a big thank you to everyone who has provided so much valuable feedback and ideas, along with heart-warming messages of appreciation so far. So please, continue to do that as it makes a big difference to both the game and the energy, we put behind making it. In time we will also share details of our publisher's Discord, which I can tell you is an awesome place to hang out in, with lots of lovely folks sharing their love of video games.

For now, stay tuned, don’t forget to visit the new Steam page, and thank you for your continued support, it means everything.

Onward soldiers!

Kostas | Rogue Sun


About the Game
supported_languages:
English*, French, German
*languages with full audio support
